verified.notes: Program serves seniors 65+ and younger disabled adults (21-64). Age threshold of 65 applies to senior pathway. Income limit of $2,982/month is for single applicant in 2026; search results do not provide separate household-of-2 income limit. Asset limits are $2,000 (individual) and $3,000 (couple) as of 2026. Phone number is Louisiana Options in Long-Term Care. Program status: Approved and effective as of 07/01/2024, expiring 06/30/2029 per federal waiver documentation.
